suite.name: TC 03 UpdatePersonalInfoTest

test.name: TC_03 Verify Personal details modification with valid values First Name

kw.name: Given Orange HRM site is launched and user is logged in
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: When User navigates to Personal Information Page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: And User updates First Name with a valid new value
Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And User clicks on Save button
Save Personal Details
Click Button
kw.msg:

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Then A success message is displayed indicating the profile was updated

test.doc: Verify that an ESS User can successfully update their First Name.
